title: eusteralis gracilis
intro: Eusteralis gracilis is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. It belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. Eusteralis gracilis has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's leaves and roots are commonly used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
